Bob Dylan with Tom Petty & The Heartbreakers
5 October 1987
Piazza Grande, Locarno, Switzerland

Master>CDr(x)>EAC(secure)>FLAC(level8)>Dime

CD1 67:01.08

1. Rainy Day Women #12&35 [3:26.62]
2. Like A Rolling Stone [6:02.29]
3. Maggie's Farm [4:09.08]
4. I'll Be Your Baby Tonight [5:24.28]
5. Dead Man, Dead Man [4:20.64]
6. The Balled Of Frankie Lee And Judas Priest [5:42.58]
7. Seeing The Real You At Last [4:43.53]
8. Watching The River Flow [3:53.54]
9. Simple Twist Of Fate [5:35.12]
10. Tomorrow Is A Long Time [4:00.00]
11. Ballad Of A Thin Man [5:58.32]
12. Shot Of Love [5:28.09]
13. Trust Yourself [4:12.66]
14. Blowin' In The Wind [4:02.58]
